description: Gordon solo defender — all skills deterministic (no chance), single run sufficient. Gordon is Lancer class on minxxx with only S1 unlocked (S1=1/S2=0/S3=0). S1 'Venom Infusion': every 2 attacks, Lancers deal extra DamageUp (op=101) and apply OppDamageDown (op=201) for 1 turn. First emulator validation of Gordon's simulator implementation.
